chunks.content:
Article: The hidden material messages in eva
[]: The hidden material messages in eva Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Mar 18, 2010 3:49 pm it lies everywhere, the theme song, the actual show. its deep, and easy to find. i mean, which three characters could be related to the line "Desprate for something to touch, a moment of kindness as if in a dream." from the theme song, the thesis of a cruel angel? and remember how EVA-01's right eye was peirced in episode 1, the right side in kabbala meant the sword, or masculine traits. couldn't this mean that unit went beserk because the piolots identity was under attack. there is only one rule to this thread, don't bring a characters sexual identity or preferance into this, in fact mo shipping, i just want you to analyse and discuss these hidden messages. im gooing to be gone till monday, im getting some tests run on me, but i hope to see a good conversation going on when i return. enjoy! (just not too much for some of you.)

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 18, 2010 3:53 pm I'm sorry, but I am so stupefied by the OP that I have no idea what this thread is supposed to be about and based on my experience here I can't envision anything good coming from this.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Mar 18, 2010 4:14 pm What Reichu is saying is that your post is incoherent and verging on the illiterate -- something that attracts trolls like flies to shit. Please shape up and start demonstrating written language skills that are in accord with your oft-proclaimed standard of education.
